inputs.label: Total Words
inputs.businessContext: Total number of words in the text to analyze.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of words in the text to analyze.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Analiz edilecek metindeki toplam kelime sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Wörter im zu analysierenden Text.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de mots dans le texte à analyser.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de palabras en el texto a analizar.

inputs.label: Total Sentences
inputs.businessContext: Total number of sentences in the text.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of sentences in the text.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de phrases dans le texte.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de oraciones en el texto.

inputs.label: Total Syllables
inputs.businessContext: Total number of syllables across all words.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of syllables across all words.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Silben über alle Wörter hinweg.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de syllabes dans tous les mots.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de sílabas en todas las palabras.

inputs.label: Total Characters (with spaces)
inputs.businessContext: Total character count including spaces; used to compute average characters per word.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total character count including spaces; used to compute average characters per word.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Boşluklar dahil toplam karakter sayısı; kelime başına ortalama karakter hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Zeichen inklusive Leerzeichen; wird zur Berechnung der durchschnittlichen Zeichen pro Wort verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de caractères espaces compris ; utilisé pour calculer la moyenne de caractères par mot.
businessContext_i18n.es: Recuento total de caracteres incluyendo espacios; se usa para calcular el promedio de caracteres por palabra.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
